ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "first_d1_season" INTEGER /* First year the team played in Division I */,
  "last_d1_season" INTEGER /* Last year the team played in Division I */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win or loss) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "class_year" INTEGER /* Class year of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of conference wins by the team */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of conference losses by the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the summary belongs to */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Summary text of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is assigned to */,
  "coach_position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruits" (
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruit */,
  "recruit_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruit */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the recruit in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the recruit in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the recruit */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the recruit */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the recruit's offer (offered, committed, signed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruit_id")
)
